texto: -You have what they call the complete package, Adders.-What do you know about my package?-No that package, you idiot! You are the complete package! I wasn't talking about what's in your trousers!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lisa J. Hobman que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “-You have what they call the complete package, Adders.-What do you know about my package?-No that…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, hilarious, package, com foco em reflexao.
